summary: The exact same-status/different-node regression is repaired when both routed and embedded Gate DAGs exist, and current-HEAD parse/persistence evidence passes. Closure is incomplete because the comparison is optional when the embedded pr-prepare Gate DAG is missing; malformed authority can still reuse stale noncritical gate_status against a current critical routed DAG before GitHub.

findings.detail: The guard runs only when gateDag && preparedGateDag. With a current routed critical DAG, current-head pr-prepare gate_status, and missing pr_context.gate_dag, resolveCurrentMergeGateStatus returns the stale status and buildMergeGateAuthorization returns allowed=true. Require preparedGateDag whenever a routed DAG is present, then compare exact normalized surfaces, and add unit/CLI coverage with GitHub uncalled.

judgment_delta: Prior block for same-status/different-DAG was closed, but the overall verdict remains block because exact surface comparison is bypassed when the embedded DAG is absent, leaving malformed authority fail-open.
